plugin_desc: Benu Networks router SNMP child template (enterprise PEN 39406). Beyond the shared Router SNMP baseline for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB interface traffic, it collects BENU-CHASSIS-MIB sensor temperature, fan status and power-supply status. Host software task CPU and memory tables are process-level metrics and are not promoted to shared device CPU or memory health metrics here.
name: Router

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Highest Benu chassis temperature sensor value in degrees Celsius, using BENU-CHASSIS-MIB sensor rows whose type is temperature.

metrics.name: device_fan_state
metrics.description: Worst Benu fan sensor state, normalized from benuSensorState so normal(1) is healthy and every other state is abnormal.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Worst Benu power-supply status, normalized from present and powered states so present and powered supply rows are healthy and every other state is abnormal.
